text.title: Hook Bank Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for one hook-bank file plus valid / invalid examples and forbidden patterns. Validator enforces this before the bank is accepted.

example.code: { "version": "1.1.0", "platform_medians": {"x": 1400, "linkedin": 600}, "patterns_active": ["before-after", "mistake-confession", "data-drop", "contrarian", "list-promise"], "rows": [ { "hook_text": "Shipped a $0 invoice to 312 customers last night. Postmortem.", "pattern": "mistake-confession", "platform": "x", "post_url": "https://x.com/u/status/123", "impressions_24h": 11400, "qualified_replies": 38, "bucket": "spiked", "flop_streak": 0 } ], "reviewed_at": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: version not semver, platform_medians empty, patterns_active empty, hook_text too short, platform not in enum, required fields missing.

forbidden.pattern: Row tagged by gut feel — bucket value not derivable from impressions_24h vs platform_medians[platform].
Pattern listed in a row but absent from patterns_active.
Bank file last touched > 14 days ago without a reviewed_at update.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Round impressions_24h to nearest 100 for display; preserve raw value in the source row.
Sort rows by impressions_24h desc within bucket for readability.
